glosses.vi: áo len; áo len chui đầu
glosses.ja: セーター; プルオーバー

translations.ja: セーターを着ているところです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present indicative; main predicate selecting an accusative object; forms a separable verb with the particle 'an' placed at clause end in main clause word order.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner agreeing with 'Pullover' as direct object.
Common noun, masculine; head of the accusative noun phrase functioning as direct object.
Separable verbal particle combining with 'ziehen' to form 'anziehen' ('put on'); surfaces in clause-final position in a main clause.

sentences.target: Der Pullover ist mir zu warm.

translations.de: Der Pullover ist mir zu warm.
translations.en: The sweater is too warm for me.
translations.es: El suéter me da demasiado calor.
translations.fr: Ce pull me tient trop chaud.
translations.it: Questo maglione mi tiene troppo caldo.
translations.zh-Hans: 这件毛衣对我来说太暖了。
translations.yue: 呢件冷衫對我嚟講太暖。
translations.ru: Этот свитер для меня слишком тёплый.
translations.pt: Este suéter é quente demais para mim.
translations.vi: Áo len này khiến tôi thấy quá nóng.
translations.ar: هذه الكنزة دافئة جدًا بالنسبة لي.
translations.nl: Deze trui is te warm voor mij.
translations.uk: Цей светр для мене надто теплий.
translations.hu: Ez a pulóver túl meleg nekem.
translations.hi: यह स्वेटर मेरे लिए बहुत गरम है।
translations.pl: Ten sweter jest dla mnie za ciepły.
translations.el: Αυτό το πουλόβερ μου είναι πολύ ζεστό.
translations.nb: Denne genseren er for varm for meg.
translations.sv: Den här tröjan är för varm för mig.
translations.ro: Puloverul ăsta e prea călduros pentru mine.
translations.cs: Tenhle svetr je na mě moc teplý.
translations.da: Denne trøje er for varm til mig.
translations.fi: Tämä villapaita on minulle liian lämmin.
translations.ja: このセーターは私には暑すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Subject noun, masculine nominative singular; linked to the predicate via the copula.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject with the predicative adjective.
1st person singular dative personal pronoun; dative experiencer/judicantis indicating perspective ('for me').
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'warm' to mark excess.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement with the copula 'ist'.

translations.fr: Je laverai le pull plus tard.
translations.zh-Hans: 我等会儿再洗这件毛衣。
translations.pt: Vou lavar o suéter mais tarde.
translations.he: אני אכבס את הסוודר אחר כך.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ giặt áo len sau.
translations.id: Nanti saya akan mencuci sweter itu.
translations.ro: O să spăl puloverul mai târziu.
translations.ja: セーターはあとで洗います。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in accusative case of 'wasche'.
Temporal adverb indicating time of the action.

sentences.target: Dieser Pullover passt dir wirklich gut.

translations.de: Dieser Pullover passt dir wirklich gut.
translations.en: This sweater really suits you well.
translations.es: Este suéter te queda muy bien.
translations.fr: Ce pull te va vraiment bien.
translations.it: Questo maglione ti sta davvero bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 这件毛衣真的很适合你。
translations.ru: Этот свитер тебе действительно очень идёт.
translations.pt: Esse suéter fica muito bem em você.
translations.tr: Bu kazak sana gerçekten çok yakışıyor.
translations.vi: Chiếc áo len này thật sự rất hợp với bạn.
translations.nl: Deze trui staat je echt heel goed.
translations.uk: Цей светр тобі справді дуже пасує.
translations.hu: Ez a pulóver tényleg nagyon jól áll neked.
translations.hi: यह स्वेटर तुम पर सचमुच बहुत जँचता है।
translations.pl: Ten sweter naprawdę bardzo ci pasuje.
translations.el: Αυτό το πουλόβερ σου πάει πραγματικά πολύ.
translations.nb: Denne genseren kler deg virkelig godt.
translations.sv: Den här tröjan passar dig verkligen jättebra.
translations.ro: Puloverul ăsta îți vine chiar foarte bine.
translations.cs: Tenhle svetr ti opravdu moc sluší.
translations.da: Denne trøje klæder dig virkelig godt.
translations.fi: Tämä villapaita sopii sinulle todella hyvin.
translations.ja: このセーターは本当にあなたに似合っています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine nominative singular; specifies the noun 'Pullover'.
Subject noun, masculine nominative singular.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive verb that selects a dative argument ('dir') meaning 'to suit/fit'.
2nd person singular dative personal pronoun; non-subject core argument required by 'passen'.
Degree/manner adverb intensifying 'gut'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'passt'; expresses the quality of the fit.
